name: Ranch Empire
description: Ranch Empire — build a 3D ranch tycoon empire right in your browser. No download. Start with a bare patch and a dog. Plant fields, raise chickens and cows, breed horses, hire farmhands, and grow into a sprawling ranch with vehicles, a dock, and a marina. Then the wilds push back. Wolves circle the pen. Bears raid the henhouse. Blizzards roll in. Survive — or pay the price. FEATURES • Open-world 3D ranch with tractors, ATVs, horses, and boats • Live multiplayer boat racing — invite friends, climb the leaderboard • Prone-sniper hunting mini-game (deer, stag, fox, hare) • Wolf + bear attacks, blizzards, droughts, plague crisis
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
